summary: Inside a tunnel, a pink car drives ahead in the same lane as the ego vehicle. The pink car gradually moves out of the lane towards the right side, eventually exiting the roadway.

events_timeline.event: A pink car drives ahead in the same lane as the ego vehicle. The pink car gradually moves out of the lane towards the right side, eventually exiting the roadway.

uncertainties: The identity of the pink car is unclear due to its faded appearance.

risk_assessment.why: There are no collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles.
